scripts.build: npm run build:lib && npm run build:docs && npm run build:examples && npm run build:worker
scripts.build:lib: npm run build -w @girk/utils && npm run build -w girky
scripts.build:examples: npm run build -w @girk/example-basic && npm run build -w @girk/example-data && npm run build -w @girk/example-multilang && npm run build -w @girk/example-config && npm run build -w @girk/example-blog && npm run build -w @girk/example-recipes
scripts.cf:build:docs: npm run build:lib && npm run build:docs
scripts.cf:build:example-basic: npm run build:lib && npm run build -w @girk/example-basic
scripts.cf:build:example-data: npm run build:lib && npm run build -w @girk/example-data
scripts.cf:build:example-multilang: npm run build:lib && npm run build -w @girk/example-multilang
scripts.cf:build:example-config: npm run build:lib && npm run build -w @girk/example-config
scripts.cf:build:example-blog: npm run build:lib && npm run build -w @girk/example-blog
scripts.cf:build:example-recipes: npm run build:lib && npm run build -w @girk/example-recipes
scripts.cf:build:sites: npm run build:lib && npm run build:docs && npm run build:examples && npm run build:worker
scripts.deploy:sites: npm run cf:build:sites && npm run deploy -w @girk/sites-worker
scripts.test: node --test scripts/release-notes.test.mjs && npm run test -w @girk/utils && npm run test -w girky
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build:lib && npm run build:docs && npm run build -w @girk/example-basic && playwright test
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:worker && npm run test:examples && npm run test:e2e
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @girk/utils && npm run lint -w girky && npm run lint -w @girk/sites-worker
scripts.fmt: npm run fmt -w @girk/utils && npm run fmt -w girky && npm run fmt -w @girk/sites-worker
scripts.fmt:check: npm run fmt:check -w @girk/utils && npm run fmt:check -w girky && npm run fmt:check -w @girk/sites-worker
